Title: ~mission(Contractor|BaseSweepTitle)
DisplayDescription:
ABOUT THE JOB
microTech Protection Services is looking for a detail-oriented mercenary professional who can quickly and safely assist us in the complete removal of illegal occupants who have temporarily gained control of ~mission(Location|Address).

RESPONSIBILITIES
• Provide own transportation to ~mission(Location|Address).
• Remove all illegal occupants found within the site; using force as necessary. 

MINIMUM QUALIFICATIONS
• 2 years of combined mercenary and security experience.
• Access to combat equipment and mode of transport.
• Available for immediate deployment.

PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS
• Experience with rapid hostility de-escalation techniques.
